name: run_inference
description: Run AXIS-MURA-v1 inference on all images in a dataset manifest. Calls the local FastAPI inference server (localhost:8321) for each study in the manifest, writes a predictions CSV with columns: study_path, ground_truth, prediction, confidence, findings.

dataset_path.description: Path to the dataset directory containing the study folders (e.g., 'data/eval-020')

manifest_path.description: Path to the manifest CSV file with columns: study_path, label (e.g., 'data/eval-020/manifest.csv')

output_path.description: Path where the predictions CSV will be written (e.g., 'results/eval-020_predictions.csv')

name: validate_results
description: Validate inference results against the original manifest. Checks that prediction count matches input count, no null predictions, and prediction distribution is plausible (not all same class).

predictions_path.description: Path to the predictions CSV generated by run_inference

manifest_path.description: Path to the original manifest CSV to validate against

name: compute_metrics
description: Compute classification metrics from predictions. Returns MCC, sensitivity, specificity, precision, NPV, F1, accuracy, confusion matrix, and 95% Wilson confidence intervals. Writes metrics to a JSON file.

predictions_path.description: Path to the predictions CSV with columns: study_path, ground_truth, prediction, confidence

manifest_path.description: Path to the manifest CSV for ground truth labels

output_path.description: Path where the metrics JSON will be written (e.g., 'results/eval-020_metrics.json')
